{{Infobox character
| name = Grandmaster Helgard
| titles = {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Grandmaster}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Grandmaster [[Helgard]] is the leader of a council of [[Grandmasters]] and serves as the representative for his specific [[Territory]]. A large, bearded man with broad shoulders, he is recognized by his blue cloak lined with white fur and is reputed to be the most talented [[Helgard Traveler]] in the city. His followers, known as [[Helgard Travelers]], are identifiable by their fur-lined coats and bone necklaces. In combat or magical practice, [[Helgard]] has demonstrated the ability to use a Gate to summon massive entities, such as a blue giant's fist, and possesses eyes that can emit a blue-green light. He is a vocal opponent of the rule of Ragnarus, arguing that the control [[Damasca]] exerts over the various [[Territories]] is illegitimate and that the [[Incarnations]] should be used to destroy [[Damasca]] rather than being imprisoned. [[Helgard]] is characterized by a fierce, sometimes aggressive temperament, often displaying a predatory or menacing demeanor during confrontations.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Helgard]] is a bearded bear of a man.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The new [[Grandmaster Helgard]] is bear-like.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Helgard]] has a bushy beard.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Helgard]] is a Grandmaster who suggests turning [[Talos]] over to [[Asphodel]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c16">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Helgard]] is a skilled [[Helgard Traveler]] and a shaggy man with a brown beard.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Helgard]] believes the reign of Ragnarus over all other [[Territories]] is unnatural and unjust.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Helgard]] was a Grandmaster who was executed by the [[Elysian Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c5">''City of Light'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"Grandmaster Helgard glared at the prisoner over his bushy beard, one hand curling almost unconsciously into a fist."<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Travelers]]
